title: gpsd security update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[1:3.26.1-1.0.1.el10_1.1]
- Replace upstream reference [Orabug: 37033219]

[1:3.26.1-1.el10_1.1]
- fix buffer overflow in NMEA2000 driver (CVE-2025-67268)
- fix integer underflow in handling of Navcom packets (CVE-2025-67269)
full_text:
[1:3.26.1-1.0.1.el10_1.1]
- Replace upstream reference [Orabug: 37033219]

[1:3.26.1-1.el10_1.1]
- fix buffer overflow in NMEA2000 driver (CVE-2025-67268)
- fix integer underflow in handling of Navcom packets (CVE-2025-67269)

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2026-0770.html
https://linux.oracle.com/cve/CVE-2025-67268.html
https://linux.oracle.com/cve/CVE-2025-67269.html
